mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly lifting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistical significance when FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending expectations and triggers negative equity repricing within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 20d returns are positive in > 55% of triggered months, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE rises during recessionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent positive growth in real personal spending and real GDP confirms broad-based demand expansion, driving corporate earnings revisions and positive equity returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and GDPC1 yields negative 60d forward returns in > 60% of observations, or the interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Declines in industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflect supply-side constraints and reduced manufacturing activity, causing short-term equity sell-offs over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines produce positive 5d forward returns in > 50% of cases during tightening periods, or the signal reverses direction when FEDFUNDS is below 1.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL level above 245 signals entrenched inflation that forces expectations of restrictive monetary policy, triggering negative equity repricing over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 20d returns are positive in > 55% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 245, or the threshold effect vanishes when controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls sustains household income and consumption capacity, supporting corporate earnings growth and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows no significant correlation with 60d forward returns across multiple expansionary periods, or positive payroll surprises consistently precede negative equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where housing starts decline while consumer price inflation remains elevated indicates demand destruction in interest-sensitive sectors, leading to negative equity returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition of falling HOUST and high CPIAUCSL yields positive 20d returns in > 60% of cases, or the interaction term fails to improve out-of-sample predictive accuracy.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during periods of elevated unemployment indicates supply-side recovery that alleviates stagflation concerns, driving positive 5-day equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases produce negative 5d forward returns in > 50% of observations when UNRATE exceeds 4.0%, or the signal loses significance during supply-chain disruption episodes.
